div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 213px; height: 120px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 211px; height: 120px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;

- cardNumber : string
- code : int
- billingAddress : Address
